title: Astro Web Development Services
metaTitle: Astro Web Development Services | Fast Marketing Sites & Blogs - Miami, FL
metaDescription: Build blazing-fast websites with Astro framework. Marketing sites, blogs, and documentation that score 100 on Core Web Vitals. Expert Astro development in Miami, Florida.
heroSubtitle: Build lightning-fast websites that rank higher and convert better with the Astro framework.
introduction: I specialize in Astro—the modern web framework that ships zero JavaScript by default. Your marketing site, blog, or documentation will load instantly, score perfect Core Web Vitals, and rank better in search results. Fast sites convert better, and Astro makes fast the default.

benefits.title: Perfect Core Web Vitals
benefits.description: Astro sites consistently score 95-100 on Lighthouse. Better page experience signals mean better rankings and more conversions.

benefits.title: Zero JavaScript Bloat
benefits.description: Ship only the JavaScript you actually need. Astro's island architecture means interactive components don't slow down static content.

benefits.title: Any Framework Integration
benefits.description: Use React, Vue, Svelte, or Solid components where needed. Astro works with your preferred tools without framework lock-in.

services.name: Marketing Websites
services.description: High-converting marketing sites with perfect performance scores, SEO best practices, and CMS integration for easy updates.

services.name: Blog & Content Sites
services.description: Content-focused sites with MDX support, full-text search, RSS feeds, and automatic image optimization.

services.name: Documentation Sites
services.description: Developer documentation with sidebar navigation, search, versioning, and syntax highlighting—built for technical audiences.

services.name: Migration & Optimization
services.description: Migrate existing sites to Astro for performance gains. Typical improvements: 2-5x faster load times and 30-50% better Core Web Vitals.

cta.title: Ready for a Faster Website?
cta.description: Let's discuss how Astro can transform your site's performance and user experience.

faqs.question: Why choose Astro over Next.js or Gatsby?
faqs.answer: Astro excels at content-focused sites—marketing pages, blogs, documentation. It ships zero JavaScript by default, resulting in faster load times than Next.js or Gatsby. For sites where interactivity is secondary to content, Astro delivers better performance with less complexity. For app-heavy sites, Next.js may still be better.

faqs.question: Can I use my preferred UI framework with Astro?
faqs.answer: Yes. Astro's 'islands' architecture lets you use React, Vue, Svelte, Solid, or Preact components anywhere in your site. Components only load JavaScript when needed—a React component on your homepage doesn't ship JS to your blog posts that don't need it.

faqs.question: How does Astro help with SEO?
faqs.answer: Astro helps SEO in multiple ways: faster page speeds improve Core Web Vitals (a ranking factor), server-rendered HTML ensures search engines see all content, built-in sitemap generation, automatic image optimization reduces page weight, and clean HTML output with proper semantic structure.

faqs.question: Can I migrate my existing site to Astro?
faqs.answer: Yes. I've migrated sites from WordPress, Jekyll, Gatsby, and custom systems to Astro. The process involves content migration (often automated), template conversion, and feature parity verification. Most migrations see immediate performance improvements and simpler content workflows.
